nodes.label: npx concurrently -c \"#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#fdba74\" \"php artisan serve\" \"php artisan queue:listen --tries=1\" \"php artisan pail --timeout=0\" \"npm run dev\" --names=server,queue,logs,vite --kill-others
nodes.norm_label: npx concurrently -c \"#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#fdba74\" \"php artisan serve\" \"php artisan queue:listen --tries=1\" \"php artisan pail --timeout=0\" \"npm run dev\" --names=server,queue,logs,vite --kill-others

nodes.label: Inventory Management System
nodes.description: A robust, enterprise-grade inventory management system built with Laravel 12 and Livewire, covering inventory tracking, sales, purchasing, and financial ledger management.

nodes.label: Laravel 12
nodes.description: PHP framework (version 12.x) used as the core backend framework of the application.

nodes.label: Laravel Livewire 3
nodes.description: Full-stack framework for Laravel providing frontend reactivity without writing JavaScript (version 3).

nodes.label: Alpine.js
nodes.description: Lightweight JavaScript framework used alongside Livewire for frontend interactivity.

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS
nodes.description: Utility-first CSS framework used for styling, with Shadcn-inspired components.

nodes.label: ApexCharts
nodes.description: JavaScript charting library used for interactive sales and cash flow trend charts on the dashboard.

nodes.label: Livewire PowerGrid
nodes.description: Data table component for Livewire with customized AJAX filters.

nodes.label: Blade Heroicons
nodes.description: Icon library used for UI icons throughout the application.

nodes.label: MySQL
nodes.description: Relational database used as the data store for the application.

nodes.label: Advanced Analytics Dashboard
nodes.description: Module providing real-time total sales, net cash flow tracking, interactive charts, top selling products, top customers, and low stock alerts.

nodes.label: Sales & POS (Point of Sale)
nodes.description: Fast POS interface supporting global discounts, exact cash computation, change tracking, invoice/receipt printing, and persistent cart state.

nodes.label: Purchases & Receiving
nodes.description: End-to-end purchase order workflow with receive-items action, supplier tracking, and history filtering.

nodes.label: Master Data Management
nodes.description: Management of Products (stock, pricing), Categories, Units, Customers, and Suppliers.

nodes.label: Finance Ledger & Cash Flow
nodes.description: Integrated double-entry style income and expense tracking with dynamic cash flow reporting and custom categorization.

nodes.label: Dynamic Localization & Settings
nodes.description: Global store information management and fully dynamic currency framework (symbol, position, separators, precision).

nodes.label: Fajar Ghifar
nodes.description: Author and maintainer of the Inventory Management System project. Also known as Fajar Ghifari Nugroho (@fajarghifar).

nodes.label: GitHub Repository
nodes.description: Source code repository hosted at https://github.com/fajarghifar/inventory-management-system.

nodes.label: MIT License
nodes.description: Open-source license under which the project is distributed.

nodes.label: PHP 8.2+
nodes.description: Server-side programming language required (version 8.2 or higher) as a prerequisite.

nodes.label: Node.js & NPM
nodes.description: JavaScript runtime and package manager used for installing frontend dependencies and building assets.

nodes.label: robots.txt
nodes.description: Standard robots exclusion file allowing all web crawlers (User-agent: *, Disallow: empty — no restrictions).

nodes.label: Application Logo (SVG)
nodes.description: SVG logo (500x500px) consisting of three distinct dark (#090909) abstract path shapes forming the application's brand mark.

nodes.label: Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.description: Promotional screenshot showing the KencanaPOS branded application across three device mockups. Central laptop shows the analytics dashboard with Total Sales (Rp 7.188.000), Gross Profit (Rp 1.018.194), Net Cash Flow, Low Stock Alert counters, a Sales Trend line chart, Income vs Expense bar chart, Recent Sales list, and Expense Breakdown donut chart.

nodes.label: KencanaPOS Brand
nodes.description: The branded name 'KencanaPOS' visible in the application navigation bar across the screenshot mockups.

nodes.label: Overview / Dashboard Page
nodes.description: Main dashboard page titled 'Overview' that monitors business performance at a glance, visible in the central screenshot.

nodes.label: Sales Trend Chart
nodes.description: Line chart on the dashboard displaying daily sales performance trends.

nodes.label: Expense Breakdown Chart
nodes.description: Donut/ring chart on the dashboard showing category-wise distribution of expenses (Our Purchase, Product Purchases, Nova Sticking).

nodes.label: Income vs Expense Chart
nodes.description: Bar chart on the dashboard providing a financial overview of income versus expenses.

nodes.label: Recent Sales List
nodes.description: Panel on the dashboard listing the latest transactions (e.g. INV.260219.0001 through INV.260219.0005) with their amounts.
